posting.sourceTitle: International Union of Bricklayers & Allied Craftsmen Local 3 NY (Ithaca Chapter)
posting.sponsorName: Joint Apprenticeship Committee for the International Union of Bricklayers & Allied Craftsmen, Local Union #3
posting.unionName: International Union of Bricklayers & Allied Craftsmen, Local Union #3
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at www.bac3ny.com or pick up and submit applications at the JAC Training Center in Whitney Point during Monday walk-in hours.
posting.applicationHours: Every Monday during the recruitment period, 9:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. and 1:00 p.m. to 3:00 p.m., excluding legal holidays.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 18 years old.
posting.educationRequirement: Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.classRequirement: Must be able to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 18 years old.
Must have a high school diploma or high school equivalency diploma (such as TASC or GED).

Must sign an affidavit stating that they are physically able to perform the work of these trades, including working with sharp objects, hazardous machinery, and possible exposure to noise and respiratory irritants; prolonged standing and walking; repeated squatting and/or bending; working indoors and outdoors in all kinds of weather; working in confined spaces; lifting and moving heavy objects and equipment up to 50 pounds; and working on ladders and scaffolds exceeding 50 feet.
Must have reliable transportation to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
Must be prepared to take a math and measurement computation test at the time of interview.
Must provide a DD-214, Certificate of Release or Discharge from Active Duty, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 18, have a high school diploma or equivalency, have reliable transportation, and be able to complete a math/measurement test and a physical-ability affidavit.
posting.contactName: JAC for the International Union of Bricklayers & Allied Craftsmen, Local Union #3
posting.contactSummary: Contact the JAC for the International Union of Bricklayers & Allied Craftsmen, Local Union #3 at (607) 786-8945 for more information.
